scripts.docker:build:web: yarn docker:check && docker build -f apps/web/Dockerfile -t inner-avatar-web:latest .
scripts.docker:build:admin: yarn docker:check && docker build -f apps/admin/Dockerfile -t inner-avatar-admin:latest .
scripts.docker:build:chatgpt: yarn docker:check && docker build -f apps/chatgpt-app/Dockerfile -t inner-avatar-chatgpt-app:latest .
scripts.docker:compose:migrate: yarn docker:check && docker compose --profile setup run --rm db-migrate
scripts.docker:compose:db-push: yarn docker:check && docker compose --profile setup run --rm db-push
scripts.mobile:pub-get: node scripts/check-flutter.mjs && cd apps/mobile && flutter pub get
scripts.mobile:analyze: node scripts/check-flutter.mjs && cd apps/mobile && flutter analyze
scripts.mobile:test: node scripts/check-flutter.mjs && cd apps/mobile && flutter test
scripts.mobile:build:android: node scripts/check-flutter.mjs && cd apps/mobile && flutter build apk --debug --dart-define=INNER_COUNCIL_API_BASE_URL=http://10.0.2.2:3000
scripts.verify:founder-calibration-code: yarn db:generate && yarn check:env && yarn test:auth && yarn test:web && yarn test:admin && yarn test:ai && yarn test:rag && yarn test:pilot && yarn smoke:rag && yarn test:founder-calibration && yarn test:founder-calibration-regression && yarn test:langsmith && yarn report:founder-calibration-setup && yarn report:founder-calibration && yarn report:founder-calibration-comparison && yarn typecheck && yarn lint && yarn build:web && yarn build:admin && yarn build:chatgpt && yarn test:chatgpt
scripts.verify:docker: yarn docker:compose:config && yarn docker:build:web && yarn docker:build:admin && yarn docker:build:chatgpt
scripts.verify:ci: yarn prisma validate && yarn db:migrate:deploy && yarn verify:founder-calibration-code && yarn verify:docker
scripts.vercel:build: yarn --cwd apps/web build && yarn --cwd apps/admin build && yarn --cwd apps/chatgpt-app build
